ValidationRule.description: Prevents an Account from being saved if Active is checked and any Shipping Address field is blank.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISPICKVAL(Active__c, "Yes") && ( ISBLANK(ShippingStreet) || ISBLANK(ShippingCity) || ISBLANK(ShippingState) || ISBLANK(ShippingPostalCode) || ISBLANK(ShippingCountry) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Shipping Address must be complete when the Account is Active. Please fill in all Shipping Address fields.
